title: On The Little God
content:
Of all the gods that gave me all their glories
    To-day there deigns to walk with me but one.
    I lead him by the hand and tell him stories.
    It is the Queen of Cyprus' little son.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "On The Little God", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
